259 H0200A_TRIL_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200A_TRIL_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200A Urinary Toileting Program: Trial Toileting Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has had a trial toileting program (e.g., scheduled toileting, prompted voiding, or bladder training). -=Not assessed/no information
